title: The Null-Point Awakening
content: [INNER_MONOLOGUE] 'Where... am I? My head feels like it was hit by a freight train.' You open your eyes to a sky the color of a fresh bruise. You are lying in a glass-edged crater. The air is still, but you can feel a rhythmic pulsing deep in your bones. A flickering, gaseous light—a spirit fragment—hovers inches from your face. It is wounded, bleeding raw energy that smells like burnt copper and ozone. As your Earth-born logic tries to process the impossible, you feel a strange pull. The spirit isn't just near you; it's reacting to you. You are an anchor in this shifting reality.

choices.text: Reach out and stabilize the spirit's heat. (Thermal Entropy Affinity)
Anchor the spirit's erratic movement. (Vector Resonance Affinity)
Offer your own life-force to heal the flicker. (Biomorphic Flux Affinity)
Merge your mind with the spirit's sensory echo. (Cognitive Distortion Affinity)

title: The Scavenger's Shadow
content: The spirit merges into your chest with a silent, blinding flash. For a moment, you are the only thing that makes sense in this desert. [INNER_MONOLOGUE] 'What was that? I feel... grounded. Different.' A figure—{npc:kaelen}—is peering over the edge of the crater now, their hand drifting toward a rusted iron knife. As they take in your {player.height}, {player.bodyType} frame and the strange, steady light now radiating from your chest, they [NPC_REACT]. 'I don't know what void you leaked out of,' the figure calls down, 'but you've sucked the life right out of the air. If you want a ride out of here, you're going to have to prove you aren't just a walking curse.'

choices.text: 'Who are you? And where am I?'
'Stay back. I'm not a curse, but I can be one if you touch that knife.'
(Ignore them and climb out of the crater yourself).

title: Arriving with the Scavenger
content: The scavenger leads you through a gap in the outpost's reinforced perimeter. The guards nod as you pass, their eyes lingering on the scavenger's knife rather than your strange arrival. {npc:kaelen} spits into the red dust. 'The Market is ahead. Find a merchant named Vane if you want to trade that light in your chest for something useful. Just don't get caught by the Syndicate patrols.'

title: The Lonely Outpost
content: You arrive at the Borderlands Outpost alone, your feet heavy with red dust. Without a local to vouch for you, the iron gates feel more like a cage than a sanctuary. A Syndicate guard blocks your path, their rifle humming with thermal energy. 'No strangers without a permit. Unless you've got Shards or something to trade.'

choices.text: [Finesse 12] Sneak past through the ventilation ducts.

title: The Market Hub
content: The Outpost Market is a frantic web of commerce and desperation. Steam vents hiss, and the smell of ozone is constant. [INNER_MONOLOGUE] 'This is where the world actually happens.' Merchants hawk fragments of technology, and scavengers recount tales of the deeper wastes. You are free to act here, but every action takes time.

choices.text: [SCAVENGE] Look for usable scrap in the outskirts.
[SOCIALIZE] Listen to the rumors in the tavern.

title: Wasteland Scavenging
content: You spend hours combing through the jagged debris of a fallen Aetherian tower. Your {player.blessedAbility} hums as you near a cluster of buried conduits. [INNER_MONOLOGUE] 'There's still energy here. I can feel it.'
